name: aboalrejal-skills
description: Plugin-safe Codex plugin for the Abo Alrejal Skills library.

interface.shortDescription: 1,686 plugin-safe skills for coding, security, product, and ops workflows.
interface.longDescription: Install a plugin-safe Codex distribution of Abo Alrejal Skills. Skills that still need hardening or target-specific setup remain available in the repo but are excluded from this plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use @frontend-development/writing-plans to plan a new feature.
